title: 45PCS Christmas Tree Ornaments Set – Burgundy, Gold & Champagne Baubles, 6cm Balls, Reindeer Decorations, Snowflakes, Glitter Hanging Ornaments for Holiday Xmas Tree & Home Décor
features: 🎄 COMPLETE 45-PIECE ORNAMENT SET This premium Christmas decoration set includes a full mix of 45 high-quality ornaments: 6cm baubles, 3.5cm mini balls, glitter snowflakes, and elegant decorative reindeer—perfect for filling medium and large Christmas trees.

✨ LUXURY BURGUNDY, GOLD & CHAMPAGNE THEME Designed in rich festive colours, this ornament set blends burgundy, gold, and champagne tones for a classy and cohesive Christmas look. Ideal for modern, luxury, rustic, or traditional holiday décor.
🌟 PREMIUM SHATTERPROOF DESIGN Crafted from durable, lightweight, shatterproof plastic, these ornaments are safe for families with children and pets while offering the sparkle and shine of real glass.

🎁 VARIETY OF SHAPES & TEXTURES Includes glitter balls, patterned baubles, lattice ornaments, mini snowflakes, and 3D reindeer figures (12×12cm). Each piece is beautifully finished with glitter, metallic sheen, or embossed designs for a high-end look.

🎅 EASY TO HANG & TREE-READY Each ornament comes with a pre-attached hanging loop, making decorating quick and effortless. Perfect for Christmas trees, garlands, wreaths, tabletops, and holiday centerpieces.
description: Transform your home this holiday season with this luxurious 45PCS Christmas Ornament Set, featuring a stunning mix of burgundy, gold, and champagne decorations. Whether you're decorating a small apartment tree or a large family Christmas tree, this set offers a complete combination of 6cm baubles, mini 3.5cm balls, snowflakes, and glitter reindeer—all crafted with exquisite attention to detail. Each ornament is made from shatterproof, lightweight, child-safe materials, ensuring durability while still delivering the elegance and shine of real glass decorations. The collection includes a variety of designs—glitter finishes, geometric patterns, metallic textures, and classic Christmas motifs—to bring depth and sparkle to your festive décor. Perfect for living rooms, offices, shops, hotels, or holiday party venues, these ornaments allow you to create a themed, cohesive Christmas display with minimum effort. Bring festive warmth, charm, and luxury to your home with this complete holiday decoration set! Quantity: 45 pieces Bauble Size: 6cm (×12), 3.5cm (×4), 6cm (16) Reindeer Decorations: 12×12cm (×2) Snowflakes: 11cm (×6), 5.5cm (×5) Colors: Burgundy / Red / Gold / Champagne Material: Shatterproof plastic
